prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为6081→6089→6846→12388→8117，整体呈波动上升趋势。2024年因专业组拆分出现异常后移至12388，2025年回弹至8117，近两年波动剧 烈。2025年基准位次约8117名；2021–2023年计划均为22人，2024年略降至21人，2025年扩至27人（扩招约28.6%）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，位于北京，传媒类顶尖院校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于北京，上海考生对京校有一定偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回弹至8117的基准、2025年大幅扩招后2026年计划可能延续扩招 或持平、以及2024年异常波动后市场情绪趋于稳定的判断，预计2026年最低位次在8117基础上小幅后移至约8250名，区间7850–8650名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 新闻学（新闻舆论学方向）
- 传播学
- 网络与新媒体。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数字媒体技术（游戏科学与技术方向）
- 数字媒体技术
- 国际新闻与传播（卓越人才实验班）
- 数据科学与大数据技术
- 广告学（品牌学方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 智能视听工程
- 英语（区域国别卓越人才实验班）
- 文化产业管理。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7850–8650名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向，一档王牌专业（新闻传播类）可冲刺但录取概率较低，三档专业作为保底选择。若位次明显优于区间下限（如低于 7850名），可重点冲刺一档新闻传播类王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 6081 → 6089 → 6846 → 12388 → 8117, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2024, due to the splitting of major groups, an anomaly occurred, moving the ranking to 12388, but it rebounded to 8117 in 2025, with significant fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8117; enrollment plans were 22 from 2021 to 2023, slightly decreased to 21 in 2024, and expanded to 27 in 2025 (an increase of about 28.6%).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, located in Beijing, and a top-tier institution in media and communication.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, and Shanghai candidates have a certain preference for universities in Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the rebound of the 2025 ranking to a baseline of 8117, the possibility of continued expansion or stability in the 2026 enrollment plan after the significant expansion in 2025, and the stabilization of market sentiment after the abnormal fluctuation in 2024, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will slightly shift back to approximately 8250, with a range of 7850 to 8650.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Network and New Media.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7850 to 8650, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction. Tier 1 flagship majors (Journalism and Communication) can be attempted but have a lower admission probability, while Tier 3 majors serve as a safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 7850), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors in Journalism and Communication.
